brand.tone: Professional and trustworthy, but warm. B2B — the reader is a café or restaurant owner. Serious enough to earn trust, friendly enough to feel approachable.
brand.voice: Direct, confident, no filler. Speak to the business owner as a peer. Use 'ti' (informal) in Albanian.
brand.positioning: Kosovo's food-service packaging specialist with the only 3D configurator in the region — see your logo on the product before you order.

tagline.al: Shiko logon tënde para se të porosisësh
tagline.en: See your logo before you order

uniqueDifferentiators: Only packaging supplier in Kosovo with a live 3D product configurator in the browser
Food-service specialist — cups, boxes, holders all in one supplier
Custom print only — everything is made to order with client's logo and colors
15 years in business, 397+ partners across Kosovo and Albania
Local manufacturer — fast delivery, direct relationship, no middlemen

targetAudience.primary: Café and coffee shop owners in Kosovo and Albania
targetAudience.secondary: Restaurant, fast food, and food delivery businesses
targetAudience.tertiary: Hotels, catering companies, corporate food buyers
painPoints: Generic unbranded packaging makes their business look unprofessional
Can't visualize how their logo will look before committing to a minimum order
Difficulty finding a local supplier who does custom print at accessible minimum quantities
Long lead times from international suppliers
motivations: Stand out from competitors with branded packaging
Impress customers with premium-looking cups and boxes
Support local — faster delivery and direct communication
Minimum order of 500 pcs is accessible for small businesses

products.description: Custom-printed paper cups for espresso, coffee, and takeaway. Highest volume product.
Paper cups for ice cream servings.
Larger cups for pasta, soup, and noodles.
Custom-printed burger and fast food boxes.

products.keyFeature: Tear-open lid — no utensils needed to open
products.description: Long rectangular sandwich box with tear-open top flap.
Pillow-shape fries box with full CMYK print.
2-cup cardboard carrier for takeaway coffee orders.
Custom-printed table paper rolls for restaurants.

campaignContext.goal: Website traffic — drive café and restaurant owners to era-printpack.com to explore products and use the 3D configurator

competitors.name: Shtypshkronja SHPK
competitors.notes: 50 years in business, enterprise clients (Burger King, ProCredit), has e-commerce shop. ERA must win on specialisation and 3D UX.

competitors.name: Viprint
competitors.notes: Mostly general printing, minimal food packaging. 7-language site.
